title: [CODEREVIEW-3] lora_l2.c CCA implementation uses compile-time IS_ENABLED but bead requires explicit LICHEN_LORA_CCA_ENABLE runtime read before lora_cad(); mutex held during CAD but busy abort path has duplicate unlocks
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lora_l2.c:1250 - No direct read of LICHEN_LORA_CCA_ENABLE (uses IS_ENABLED(CONFIG_...)); CAD inside modem_mutex but abort path unlocks multiple times potentially. firmware/bridge-zephyr version still missing entirely. Busy abort returns -EBUSY correctly but needs verification.
